title: lomariopsis holttumii
intro: Lomariopsis holttumii, also known as the Holttum's lomariopsis, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Lomariopsidaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Southeast Asian folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lomariopsis holttumii are attributed to its ability to treat various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the Lomariopsis holttumii plant are often dried and made into infusions or decoctions for medicinal use.
